name: Laboratory experiments on Limacina helicina: carbonate chemistry, nutrients, and respiration in 2019
description: Laboratory experimental data for the pteropod Limacina helicina collected on September 1, 2019, at a single station. The dataset includes measurements of carbonate system parameters (pH, pCO2, DIC, AT, Omega aragonite/calcite), dissolved oxygen, nutrients (nitrate/nitrite, silicate, phosphate), temperature, salinity, and respiration rates under supersaturated treatment conditions. Quality flags and standard errors are provided for key variables.
